import sys, json
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')

# Show memory and files sections

print('memory keys:', list(sakura.get('memory', {}).keys()))
print('memory:', json.dumps(sakura.get('memory', {}), indent=2))
print('files:', json.dumps(sakura.get('files', {}), indent=2))
